heading: Proof points from three generations of hearing-care operating expertise.
intro: InnerScope's brands reach consumers through OTCHealth across national retail, pharmacy, and direct-to-consumer channels. A few highlights that show the depth of the operating base.

items.title: iHEAR Matrix in national retail
items.body: iHEAR Matrix Rechargeable over-the-counter hearing aids launched into Walmart's nationwide over-the-counter hearing aid display in 4,218 stores in November 2023.

items.title: HearingAssist on the Walmart shelf
items.body: The HearingAssist brand has been sold through Walmart for years, with branded in-store displays placed across more than 750 Walmart locations, and distribution that expanded into CVS, Rite Aid, and Walgreens.
items.image_alt: HearingAssist over-the-counter hearing aid product display inside a Walmart store.

items.title: The iHEARtest at-home hearing screener
items.body: iHEARtest is an app-based, at-home hearing screening tool from the iHEAR technology base, part of the teleaudiology and remote-fitting infrastructure that came with the 2021 iHEAR Medical acquisition.

items.title: Multi-retailer and pharmacy reach
items.body: Across the iHEAR and HearingAssist brands, products have reached consumers through Walmart, CVS, Rite Aid, and Walgreens, alongside the direct-to-consumer storefront at OTCHealthMart.com.
